value.string: Getting all Search nparameters by calling bot excelDB.
select b.*  from [OpenPosition$] a  inner join [SearchFilter$] b on a.JobRequestNo = b.JobRequestNo where a.Status not in ('Closed','OnHold','Pending')

value.expression: select b.*  from [OpenPosition$$] a  inner join [SearchFilter$$] b on a.JobRequestNo = b.JobRequestNo where a.JobRequestNo = '$strJobRequestNo$' and a.Status not in ('Closed','OnHold','Pending')
